## Source: ghsa-malware (82490b358a9f091d2164c439790ea068e96bf8c37b9a9a35dbea25c35dc52de1)
## Source: ossf-package-analysis (489126ea9b749d234acf05494d90592732b92342e89b8182c4edde2667080594)
The OpenSSF Package Analysis project identified 'monolith-twirp-pipelinemonitor-monitoring' @ 1.0.2 (rubygems) as malicious.

It is considered malicious because:

- The package executes one or more commands associated with malicious behavior.
